label: Ask Rhozly AI from anywhere
items: Watchlist cards now have an 'Ask Rhozly AI about this' button so you can dig into an ailment in seconds.
Every Shed plant card has a quick AI button — get advice on a specific plant without typing its name.
The Daily Brief on the dashboard has a new 'Got a plant question?' chip that opens the chat with today's context already loaded.

label: Plant Doctor History
items: Search past Plant Doctor sessions by plant or condition name.
Filter the history by action — All / Identify / Diagnose / Pest.

label: Plant Search
items: Plant search across providers can now include Rhozly AI suggestions alongside Perenual and Verdantly — labelled clearly so you know where each result came from.
